name: soapysdr0.8-module-audio
title: soapysdr0.8-module-audio
description:
Audio device support for SoapySDR
The SoapyAudio project provides a SoapySDR module for using Software
Defined Radio devices that are connected through audio interfaces.
It uses hamlib to provide control of tuning and other functions where
available.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use soapysdr0.8-module-audio because Audio device support for SoapySDR.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use soapysdr0.8-module-audio as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair soapysdr0.8-module-audio with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `soapysdr0.8-module-audio --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
